transfers.title: Geldtransfers nach Venezuela
transfers.note: Ria Money Transfer hat Gebühren für Transfers nach Venezuela bis 15. Juli 2026 erlassen.

meru.title: Meru — gebührenfreie Überweisungen
meru.note: Meru hat während der Krise die Gebühren für Überweisungen nach Venezuela gestrichen. Prüfe die aktuellen Bedingungen in der App oder auf der offiziellen Website, bevor du sendest.

banesco.title: Banesco — Spenden mit Matching

ofac.title: OFAC General License 60 (USA)
ofac.note: Das US-Finanzministerium (OFAC) hat am 25. Juni 2026 die General License 60 erlassen, die Transaktionen im Zusammenhang mit humanitärer Erdbebenhilfe für Venezuela trotz geltender Sanktionen erlaubt. Die Lizenz läuft am 23. Oktober 2026 ab. Quelle: state.gov. Vigil bietet keine Rechtsberatung — bitte die offizielle Quelle konsultieren.

propertyAssessment.title: Structural Safety Assessment
propertyAssessment.subtitle: Request a voluntary assessment of your home after the earthquake. Green/yellow/red tags follow the ATC-20 standard.
propertyAssessment.disclaimer: This assessment is a volunteer professional opinion, not an official government inspection. It does not override orders from local building or emergency authorities.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you observe in natural language…
form.photoNote: JPG/PNG/WebP, max 5 MB. AI only prioritizes queue — never assigns tags.
form.consent: I agree my request will be processed per Vigil Privacy Policy.
form.accuracy: I confirm this information is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
form.success: Request registered. Save your private tracking link.

claim.title: Your assessment request
claim.relocationLinked: Your relocation request is linked to resource exchange.
claim.privacyNote: Your exact address and contact are never shown publicly.

viewMode.pickerTitle: What do you need right now?
viewMode.pickerSubtitle: We personalize the menu for your situation. You can always see everything.

busco_a_alguien.title: Searching for someone
tips: Search by name or upload a photo — we compare Vigil and Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela at once.
Save your claim link if you report someone — it's the only way to manage your report without an account.
Check public notes on each profile — they may have recent sightings.

necesito_ayuda.title: You need help now
tips: Use I Need Help to drop your location on the map — rescue teams see it in real time.
Call 911 or 0800-RESCATE before relying on the app alone.
Report connectivity if you find WiFi or signal — it helps others communicate.

quiero_ayudar.title: You want to help
tips: Register as a volunteer with your skills — rescue, medical, logistics, and more.
Post offers or needs on Exchange — contacts go through Vigil, not public phone numbers.
Register a collection point if your community receives donations.

soy_organizacion.title: You represent an organization
tips: Request listing on Organizations — admin approval required before public visibility.
Use Exchange and Calendar to coordinate resources and events with the community.
Check the Search network for federated sister platforms.

equipo_rescate.title: Rescue team
tips: The main map shows needs, resources, aftershocks, and collection points in layers.
Mark your active team so coordinators know where you operate.
Review Connectivity for signal and communication points.

solo_informacion.title: Information only
tips: Information aggregates USGS, GDACS, ReliefWeb, and emergency contacts.
Statistics shows Vigil counts and federated DTV data.
News and Wall have official updates and community messages.

busco_a_alguien.label: Searching for someone
busco_a_alguien.description: Diaspora families searching for missing persons

soy_organizacion.label: I'm an organization
soy_organizacion.description: NGOs, rescue teams, and aid groups

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Answers to frequently asked questions about Vigil.

whatIsVigil.a: Vigil is a humanitarian crisis platform that brings together missing persons search, live maps, resource exchange, and official disaster data in one mobile-friendly app.

government.a: No. Vigil is operated by Bbluestudios LLC under the YouTheWave initiative. It does not share user data with the Venezuelan government. See /privacy for details.

install.q: How do I install the app?
install.a: On mobile: open vigil.youthewave.org in Safari (iOS) or Chrome (Android) → Share → Add to Home Screen.

languages.a: 8 languages via the header switcher. Spanish is default.

free.a: Yes. Donation links on /donaciones go directly to verified organizations, not to Vigil.

search.q: How do I search for someone?
search.a: Go to Search (/buscar). Enter a name or filter by state. Results include Vigil and DTV federated records.

report.q: How do I report someone missing?
report.a: Go to Report (/reportar). Save your claim link — it's the only way to manage your report without an account.

claimLink.a: A unique URL (/mi-reporte/[token]) to update status and manage your report without a password.

phone.q: Can others see my phone number?
phone.a: No. Contact information is never shown on public pages.

status.a: Missing = active search. Found alive = safe. Found deceased = confirmed deceased. Unverified = not yet admin-verified.

photo.a: Upload a photo on the search page. AI suggests possible matches — always verify with families and authorities.

pfif.a: Person Finder Interchange Format — Vigil exports at /api/pfif.

sighting.q: How do I add a sighting note?
sighting.a: On a person's detail page, submit a public note with location and time. Do not include private contact info.

readMap.q: How do I read the crisis map?
readMap.a: The home map shows aftershocks, needs, resources, shelters, hospitals, and more.

needHelp.q: How do I report I need help?
needHelp.a: Go to I Need Help (/necesito-ayuda) and drop a pin with a description.

collectionPoint.a: A location accepting donated goods. Register at /punto-de-acopio or find points on the map.

colors.q: What are the map layer colors?
colors.a: Layer-specific — see map legend. Property assessments use ATC-20 colors.

register.q: How do I register as a volunteer?
register.a: Go to Volunteers (/voluntarios), select skills and languages, and provide contact.

exchange.a: Go to Exchange (/intercambio) to offer or request resources. Listings expire after 7 days.

contact.a: Contact requests go through Vigil — phone numbers are never public.

structural.a: Only if registered with structural skills and assigned by admin.

unverified.a: Citizen submission not yet confirmed by admin or official source.

flag.q: How do I report inappropriate content?
flag.a: Use the flag button on /muro. For missing persons, contact support@youthewave.org.

structural.a: No. Volunteer field opinions following ATC-20, not government inspections.

hotline.a: 0800-RESCATE — always shown in the site banner.

wifi.q: How do I report WiFi or Starlink?
wifi.a: Go to Connectivity (/conectividad) and report signal type with location.

alerts.q: Where do official alerts come from?
alerts.a: /informacion aggregates USGS, GDACS, ReliefWeb. /noticias shows ReliefWeb updates.

listed.a: Submit via org registration. Admin approval required.

sister.a: Independent citizen crisis tools linked at /red.

erasure.q: How do I request data erasure?

diasporaHub.subtitle: Koordination für alle, die Hilfe aus Südflorida nach Venezuela organisieren

deploymentSuggestion.question: Bist du in einer anderen Region? {label} ist verfügbar.
deploymentSuggestion.regionsPrivacyNote: Der Regionsvorschlag nutzt nur das ungefähre Land deiner Verbindung (Vercel-Netzwerk-Header). Kein GPS, dein Standort wird nie gespeichert, und es werden dafür keine Cookies verwendet.

prep.title: Notfallvorsorge
prep.subtitle: Leitfäden Vorher / Während / Danach, adaptiert aus offiziellen Quellen (FEMA, Ready.gov, NWS, Rotes Kreuz).
prep.offlineHint: Die Leitfäden funktionieren offline, sobald sie einmal geöffnet wurden.
prep.planLocalNote: Dieser Plan wird nur auf deinem Gerät gespeichert. Er wird nie an Vigil oder einen Server gesendet.
prep.offlineNote: Du bist offline — dieser Leitfaden funktioniert ohne Internet.
prep.sourcesNote: Inhalte ausschließlich aus diesen Quellen adaptiert. Vigil erstellt keine eigenen Sicherheitsratschläge.
